rule_text: AP Form 9 'Tender for the Supply of Goods' is the standard agreement template — contractor agrees to supply goods to the Government, forwards EARNEST MONEY refundable if tender not accepted, with description, quality, rate, and total quantity specified.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Form 9 (under Article 131)
verification_method: Goods supply agreements should follow Form 9 structure with EMD-attached + 4-column quality/rate/quantity table

rule_text: AP Goods supply contracts have these binding clauses: (a) breach by contractor — contract terminable without compensation, (b) Government may end contract at any time on giving N day's notice, (c) goods must equal contracted samples and Government-officer approval, (d) delivery free of charge to Government at contractor's risk, (e) rejection-removal at contractor's expense within 7 days, (f) Government may reject and purchase from elsewhere on contractor failure (extra cost charged to contractor).
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Form 9 / Conditions of contract clauses 1-5
verification_method: Check tender SCC/agreement contains these 6 mandatory clauses; reject contracts missing rejection / breach-termination / delivery-at-contractor-risk provisions
